ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark problem */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the problem */,
  "vars" INTEGER /* Number of variables in the problem */,
  "cons" INTEGER /* Number of constraints in the problem */,
  "found_objective" REAL /* Objective value found by the solver */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the benchmark (easy, medium, hard) */,
  "average_solver_time" REAL /* Average time taken by solvers for this benchmark */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the benchmark was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmarks_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solvers" (
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solver */,
  "solver_name" TEXT /* Name of the solver */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the solver */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the solver's capabilities */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the solver */,
  "creator" TEXT /* Name of the creator of the solver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark being tested */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver used */,
  "solver_calls" INTEGER /* Number of calls made to the solver */,
  "solving_time" REAL /* Time taken by the solver to solve the benchmark */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the entire process */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the solver run (success, failure, timeout) */,
  "solution_quality" REAL /* Quality of the solution obtained (e.g., optimal, suboptimal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institutional affiliation of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used for the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver */,
  "average_time" REAL /* Average time taken by the solver across benchmarks */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the solver (% of benchmarks solved) */,
  "failure_rate" REAL /* Failure rate of the solver (% of benchmarks failed) */,
  "timeout_rate" REAL /* Timeout rate of the solver (% of benchmarks timed out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_metrics_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of specific permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message content */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benchmark */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_tags_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solver_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "solver_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the solver */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solver_tags_solver_id FOREIGN KEY ("solver_id") REFERENCES solvers ("solver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the benchmark */,
  "benchmark_file" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark file */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
